caption: A group of men gather outdoors in front of a white building, with several vehicles parked in the background. Most of the men are dressed in white traditional Indian clothing, while others wear dark shirts. The scene remains largely static, with the men standing close together and facing forward. The video is overlaid with a red and white news graphic from "NEWS 18 इंडिया." At the top, a banner reads "कांग्रेस छटपटाई, तेजस्वी की 'पिक्चर' बाकी है" or "कांग्रेसे छटपटाई, तेजस्वी की 'पिक्चर' बाकी है." A red ticker at the bottom states "निर्दलीय MLA सुमित कुमार सिंह मंत्री बने." To the right, small inset photos of men are labeled "विजेन्द्र यादव" and "श्रवण कुमार." In the latter frames, a larger inset photo appears on the left featuring a man labeled "मुख्यमंत्री नीतीश कुमार." The timestamp "10:03 PM" is visible in the bottom right corner.
